purpose: Declare the single canonical cockpit architecture before further dashboard/runtime builds.

final_platform_mission.summary: Claire must become a governed autonomous intelligence platform, not a static dashboard.

protected_stage_range.reason: AutoDesign, solution structuring, buildability, viability, manufacturability/deployability, feasibility validation, and design portal output must remain first-class.

canonical_cockpit_contract.truth_rule: Backend owns all runtime truth; cockpit renders only.
canonical_cockpit_contract.no_dev_surface_rule: No Swagger, docs, OpenAPI, health control, or endpoint list is exposed in the operator cockpit.
canonical_cockpit_contract.no_fake_output_rule: The cockpit may show unavailable/waiting/empty states, but may not fabricate discoveries, scoring, portfolios, breakthroughs, designs, packages, or route states.

canonical_workspaces.label: Runtime
canonical_workspaces.purpose: Manual run state, continuous runtime state, lifecycle state, route state, review counts.

canonical_workspaces.label: Intelligence
canonical_workspaces.purpose: Signals, governance, trend discovery, cluster formation, thesis formation, gap detection, discovery candidates.

canonical_workspaces.label: Portfolio
canonical_workspaces.purpose: Portfolio creation, optimization, risk/exposure notes, action recommendations.

canonical_workspaces.label: Breakthrough
canonical_workspaces.purpose: Breakthrough identification, classification, category routing, threshold gates.

canonical_workspaces.label: Design
canonical_workspaces.purpose: Auto Invention, solution structuring, buildability, viability, manufacturability, feasibility, design portal outputs.

canonical_workspaces.label: Acquisition
canonical_workspaces.purpose: Market positioning, moat, business model, competitor analysis, acquirer mapping, acquisition fit, final package.

canonical_workspaces.label: Sources
canonical_workspaces.purpose: Source universes, trust, governance, probes, evidence capture.

canonical_workspaces.label: Review Queue
canonical_workspaces.purpose: Operator-gated promotion, evidence review, candidate review, governance disposition.

canonical_workspaces.label: System
canonical_workspaces.purpose: Diagnostics, route availability, payload verification, update governance, regression guard, lifecycle memory.

frontend_consolidation_rules.next_required_action: Build a route-truth verification and cockpit payload binding layer before adding new UI panels.

build_order_from_here.name: Active Route Truth Verification Harness
build_order_from_here.goal: Create a testable route truth endpoint/audit that proves the running backend returns the cockpit's required payloads.

build_order_from_here.name: Single Payload Adapter Consolidation
build_order_from_here.goal: Make authored cockpit use one payload adapter and one fallback policy.

build_order_from_here.name: Continuous Runtime Executor Binding
build_order_from_here.goal: Bind continuous runtime buttons and state to the real executor/cycle store.

build_order_from_here.name: Workspace Data Contracts
build_order_from_here.goal: Define exact payload contracts per workspace: runtime, intelligence, portfolio, breakthrough, design, acquisition, sources, review, system.

build_order_from_here.name: Legacy Dashboard Quarantine Gate
build_order_from_here.goal: Stop noncanonical frontend shells from affecting the operator cockpit.

build_order_from_here.name: Lifecycle Stage Status Renderer
build_order_from_here.goal: Render all 30 lifecycle stages with route-aware status, skipped_by_route reasons, evidence, confidence, and terminal state.

build_order_from_here.name: Candidate Review and Promotion Workflow
build_order_from_here.goal: Surface candidates and operator review actions without automatic truth mutation.

build_order_from_here.name: Portfolio/Breakthrough/Design/Acquisition Workspace Binding
build_order_from_here.goal: Bind downstream workspaces to backend-owned artifacts and empty states.

build_order_from_here.name: Lifecycle Memory and Recursive Self-Ingestion Surface
